issues.title: Location list is not sortable or filterable
issues.description: The 'Top Locations' list shows locations ranked by count, but there is no way to sort by a different metric or filter by district.
issues.expected: Sort by count, name, or district; filter by district or area
issues.actual: Static list, no sorting or filtering

issues.title: No way to export location data
issues.description: Location data (counts, percentages) cannot be exported. A data analyst needs this for reports.
issues.expected: Export button to download location data as CSV

summary: Locations page shows geographic data but location list lacks sorting/filtering and export.
